reasoning: Your current limiter is lactate clearance highlighted by the 25W drop between 5-min and 20-min power efforts. Addressing this directly with over-unders will enhance your aerobic efficiency and fatigue resistance necessary for the Alpine Loop climb. As seen in your last ride, focusing on sustained efforts with fluctuations mirrors race conditions.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4x(5 min at 242W, 3 min at 201W, 2 min at 256W). Recover 3 min easy spin between blocks.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
